description_long: A male security guard is depicted standing upright in a standard black uniform, consisting of a short-sleeved button-up shirt and matching trousers. The shirt features a visible security badge on the left chest and a patch insignia on the right upper sleeve, indicating official status. He wears a black utility belt equipped with various items, including a radio and pouches, and black shoes. The guard has a neatly groomed beard and a composed, alert facial expression. His posture is formal, with arms relaxed at his sides and feet shoulder-width apart. The uniform is clean, well-fitted, and professional, suitable for urban environments such as streets, malls, or office complexes.
description: A male security guard in a black uniform with a badge, sleeve insignia, and utility belt, standing upright and alert.
description_view_0: Front view shows the security guard's face, chest badge, and full uniform details including the utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the guard, the sleeve insignia, and the equipment on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the uniform, the utility belt, and the guard's overall stance.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, sleeve insignia, and belt equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal black short-sleeved button-up shirt with a chest badge, matching black trousers, a black utility belt with equipment, and black shoes. The uniform includes a blue and white patch insignia on the right upper sleeve and is standardized for professional security personnel, with no hat or tie present.
attribute_security_insignia: blue and white patch on right upper sleeve
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms relaxed at sides and feet shoulder-width apart, projecting an alert and professional demeanor.
